title: assertion failure when deleting rows from table to which a FK constraint is defined
poc: CREATE TABLE PKTABLE ( ptest1 int, ptest2 int, ptest3 text, PRIMARY KEY(ptest1, ptest2) );
CREATE TABLE FKTABLE ( ftest1 int, ftest2 int, ftest3 int, CONSTRAINT constrname FOREIGN KEY(ftest1, ftest2) REFERENCES PKTABLE MATCH FULL ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE SET NULL);
DELETE FROM PKTABLE WHERE ptest1=1 and ptest2=2;
DELETE FROM PKTABLE WHERE ptest1=5 and ptest2=10;
key_bug_features: deleting rows with foreign key constraint defined
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE PKTABLE ( ptest1 int, ptest2 int, ptest3 text, PRIMARY KEY(ptest1, ptest2) );
CREATE TABLE FKTABLE ( ftest1 int, ftest2 int, ftest3 int, CONSTRAINT constrname FOREIGN KEY(ftest1, ftest2) REFERENCES PKTABLE MATCH FULL ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE SET NULL);
DELETE FROM PKTABLE WHERE ptest1 = 1 AND ptest2 = 2;
